title: Genomics of lung cancer.
author: Borczuk AC Toonkel RL Powell CA
content: S-EPMC2674225 PMC2674225 Genomics of lung cancer. This review focuses on recent research using genomics to examine lung carcinogenesis, histologic differentiation, and progression.
